_comment: DATAGLOW Enterprise Policy File — copy to dataglow-policy.json to activate. Version must be 1.

_disable_reference.byokStory: Blocks the BYOK/external-LLM Story tab. Prevents data-derived content from being sent to OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, or Perplexity endpoints. Recommended for any deployment where datasets may contain PHI or sensitive business data.
_disable_reference.webrtcRooms: Blocks the Rooms peer-to-peer collaboration feature, which opens WebRTC connections on the local network. Required for environments where hospital IDS/IPS systems block or alert on P2P traffic.
_disable_reference.cdnFetches: Blocks all lazy CDN loads (DuckDB-WASM bundle, PDF.js, WebLLM weights). For air-gapped or network-namespaced deployments: vendor the DuckDB-WASM bundle locally before enabling this. Without local vendoring the app will not load.
_disable_reference.federatedLearning: Blocks the federated learning coordinator and its WebRTC/WebSocket transport. Required where only the covered entity (not the individual analyst) is authorized to disclose aggregate statistics.

_require_reference.auditLog: Writes a session-start audit entry and policy fingerprint to the browser console. Pair with a browser extension or Tauri sidecar that captures console output to a SIEM or audit trail.
_require_reference.enterpriseBuild: Marks this session as enterprise-policy-governed in all Trust Certificates and exported provenance packets. The policy SHA-256 fingerprint is embedded in every signed artifact.
